hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"UserPromptSubmit","additionalContext":"Reminder: Use TodoWrite to plan and track any multi-step task — mark items complete as you go, not in a batch at the end. For independent research, codebase exploration, or work that can run in parallel, dispatch Agent calls (Explore for searches, general-purpose for bigger tasks) instead of doing everything sequentially in the main thread. You are effective at both when you remember to use them."}}'
